name: Pikachu
description: A cheerful Electric-type Pokémon that stores electricity in its cheeks.

name: Charizard
description: A fierce Fire/Flying-type Pokémon known for its powerful flame breath.

name: Bulbasaur
description: A Grass/Poison-type Pokémon that carries a plant bulb on its back.

name: Squirtle
description: A Water-type Pokémon that sprays water from its mouth with great force.

name: Mewtwo
description: A powerful Psychic-type Pokémon created through genetic manipulation.

name: Eevee
description: A Normal-type Pokémon known for its ability to evolve into many forms.

name: Snorlax
description: A massive Pokémon that spends most of its time sleeping and eating.

name: Gengar
description: A Ghost/Poison-type Pokémon that lurks in the shadows to scare prey.

name: Dragonite
description: A Dragon/Flying-type Pokémon known for its kindness and strength.

name: Lucario
description: A Fighting/Steel-type Pokémon that can sense and manipulate aura.
